{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Representative",
  "description": "Yellow Door Hotels (also known as Yellow Door Apartments) is a highly-rated, boutique serviced apartment brand located in the Wuse 2 district of Abuja, Nigeria. Combining the premium amenities of a 5-star hotel with the privacy and comfort of a personal home, it is a popular choice for business travelers, digital nomads, and professionals looking for a stylish retreat.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Abuja

Job Summary


	In this role, you will handle inquiries, resolve complaints, and coordinate with hotel teams to ensure every guest experience is smooth, personalized and memorable while providing excellent customer service.


Key Responsibilities


	Respond to calls, emails, and social media chats
	Log issues, escalate when needed, and follow up until closure
	Help with reservations, modifications, cancellations, and special requests
	Collect guest feedback and monitor review platforms
	Maintain accurate records in CRM/booking system, prepare daily reports


Requirements


	Proven work experience as a Customer Service Representative.
	Conflict resolution skill
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to stay calm under pressure
	Service mindset and neat appearance
	Flexibility to work weekends, evenings, and holidays.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: ydmail0003@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Customer Service Representative Job at Yellow Door Hotels




        
    

        
        Yellow Door Hotels (also known as Yellow Door Apartments) is a highly-rated, boutique serviced apartment brand located in the Wuse 2 district of Abuja, Nigeria. Combining the premium amenities of a 5-star hotel with the privacy and comfort of a personal home, it is a popular choice for business travelers, digital nomads, and professionals looking for a stylish retreat.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Abuja

Job Summary
     

            
    




	In this role, you will handle inquiries, resolve complaints, and coordinate with hotel teams to ensure every guest experience is smooth, personalized and memorable while providing excellent customer service.


Key Responsibilities


	Respond to calls, emails, and social media chats
	Log issues, escalate when needed, and follow up until closure
	Help with reservations, modifications, cancellations, and special requests
	Collect guest feedback and monitor review platforms
	Maintain accurate records in CRM/booking system, prepare daily reports


Requirements


	Proven work experience as a Customer Service Representative.
	Conflict resolution skill
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to stay calm under pressure
	Service mindset and neat appearance
	Flexibility to work weekends, evenings, and holidays.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Station Manager
Job Location: Along Akure&ndash;Ilesha Road, Akure - Ondo
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the day-to-day operations of the station.
	Monitor sales performance and ensure achievement of targets.
	Ensure accurate stock management and reconciliation of petroleum products.
	Supervise station staff, including supervisors, cashiers, and pump attendants.

	Candidate must also attach Nysc certificate.

Station Manager Job at Nepal Energies




        
    

        
        Nepal Energies is a leading player in the Downstream, midstream and upstream sector of the oil and gas industry in country , we have branches cut across different regions in the country and across africa

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Station Manager
Job Location: Along Akure–Ilesha Road, Akure - Ondo
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Oversee the day-to-day operations of the station.
	Monitor sales performance and ensure achievement of targets.
	Ensure accurate stock management and reconciliation of petroleum products.
	Supervise station staff, including supervisors, cashiers, and pump attendants.
	Ensure compliance with operational, safety, and environmental regulations.
	Manage cash handling processes and banking activities.
	Investigate and report product shortages, losses, or operational discrepancies.
	Maintain excellent customer service standards.
	Prepare and submit operational reports to management.
	Ensure proper maintenance of station facilities and equipment.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc Degree with 1 - 3 years of work experience. 


Salary
N250,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their resume to: [email protected] with the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail  (e.g., Station Manager – Akure).

Note


	Candidate must stay close to stated location Along Akure–Ilesha Road, Akure
	Candidate must also attach Nysc certificate.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "SnappyCX is a leading Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) company committed to transforming the way businesses operate. We provide end-to-end support and connect businesses with top-tier professionals from a variety of industries through strategic staff outsourcing. Our suite of services spans Finance &amp; Accounting, Marketing &amp; Sales, Virtual Assistance, Customer Support, IT &amp; Software Development and Back-end office services.


We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lagos (Remote)
Job Type: Full-Time / Part-Time | Monday&ndash;Friday



Role Summary


	This is a strategy-driven organic social media management role, not a content creation role, and not a paid advertising role.
	The candidate will not be filming or editing content; a videographer is already in place for that.
	The candidate will not be managing paid ad campaigns; a separate Digital Media Buyer role covers that. This role owns how content gets planned, scheduled, posted, captioned, and engaged with across owned social channels, with strategic ownership of the overall social media calendar and growth approach.


Core Responsibilities
Social Media Strategy:


	Own and evolve the content pillar strategy (Founder Story, Expert Authority, Product in Real Life, CEO Behind the Scenes, Community and Culture)
	Build monthly content calendars aligned to the established weekly posting rhythm and the content delivered by the videographer
	Recommend strategy adjustments based on what is and is not driving engagement and growth
	Develop platform-specific strategy as needed (Instagram primary, with recommendations on TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube as relevant)
	Bring informed point of view and proposed strategy to planning conversations, rather than waiting to be told what to post


Scheduling and Publishing:


	Schedule and publish all approved content across owned social channels on a consistent cadence (currently 5 days per week on the feed)
	Manage the content scheduling tool (currently Later) and ensure nothing is missed or delayed
	Coordinate timing with the videographer&#39;s delivery schedule so content goes out within the planned windows
	Maintain a rolling content calendar visible to the founder, showing what is scheduled and what is needed


Caption Writing and Voice:


	Write captions in the founder&#39;s authentic first-person voice: personal, energetic, confident, and specific rather than generic or advisory
	Match caption tone to content pillar (educational and authoritative for Expert Authority content, warm and personal for Founder Story content, etc.)
	Maintain consistent brand voice across all platforms while adapting format to each platform&#39;s norms


Community Management and Engagement:


	Monitor and respond to comments and DMs in a timely manner, in the founder&#39;s voice or an approved brand voice
	Identify and escalate any sensitive, negative, or time-critical messages to the founder directly
	Proactively engage with community members, customers, and relevant accounts to build relationships and visibility
	Identify user-generated content and customer tags worth resharing


Performance Reporting and Optimization:


	Track engagement, follower growth, reach, and content performance across all managed channels
	Report monthly on what content is performing best and why, with clear recommendations
	Identify trends, formats, or topics worth testing based on performance data and platform trends
	Flag underperforming content patterns early rather than continuing them by default


What This Role is Not:


	To avoid mismatched expectations, this role explicitly does not include the following. These are owned by other people or roles already in place:
	Filming, shooting, or editing video and photo content (owned by the contracted videographer)
	Paid social or Google ad buying, campaign management, or ad budget strategy (covered under a separate Digital Media Buyer role)
	Email marketing execution in Klaviyo (coordination is expected, ownership is not)
	Bookkeeping, accounting, or financial reporting
	Website or Shopify management


Requirements


	3 to 5 years of managing organic social strategy for a brand or founder personal page, with measurable growth results to show
	Strong working knowledge of Instagram (primary), TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube
	Demonstrated experience building and maintaining multi-week or monthly content calendars
	Strong caption and short-form copywriting skills; ability to write convincingly in a founder&#39;s first-person voice
	Experience managing comments, DMs, and community engagement professionally and on-brand Beauty, hair care, or CPG experience
	Strongly preferred; understanding of the natural hair or beauty community is a significant plus&nbsp;
	Experience with social scheduling platforms (Later or similar) preferred
	Ability to translate platform analytics into plain-language insight and recommendations, not just exported numbers.

Social Media Manager Job at SnappyCX




        
    

        
        SnappyCX is a leading Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) company committed to transforming the way businesses operate. We provide end-to-end support and connect businesses with top-tier professionals from a variety of industries through strategic staff outsourcing. Our suite of services spans Finance & Accounting, Marketing & Sales, Virtual Assistance, Customer Support, IT & Software Development and Back-end office services.


We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

            
    



Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lagos (Remote)
Job Type: Full-Time / Part-Time | Monday–Friday



Role Summary


	This is a strategy-driven organic social media management role, not a content creation role, and not a paid advertising role.
	The candidate will not be filming or editing content; a videographer is already in place for that.
	The candidate will not be managing paid ad campaigns; a separate Digital Media Buyer role covers that. This role owns how content gets planned, scheduled, posted, captioned, and engaged with across owned social channels, with strategic ownership of the overall social media calendar and growth approach.


Core Responsibilities
Social Media Strategy:


	Own and evolve the content pillar strategy (Founder Story, Expert Authority, Product in Real Life, CEO Behind the Scenes, Community and Culture)
	Build monthly content calendars aligned to the established weekly posting rhythm and the content delivered by the videographer
	Recommend strategy adjustments based on what is and is not driving engagement and growth
	Develop platform-specific strategy as needed (Instagram primary, with recommendations on TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube as relevant)
	Bring informed point of view and proposed strategy to planning conversations, rather than waiting to be told what to post


Scheduling and Publishing:


	Schedule and publish all approved content across owned social channels on a consistent cadence (currently 5 days per week on the feed)
	Manage the content scheduling tool (currently Later) and ensure nothing is missed or delayed
	Coordinate timing with the videographer's delivery schedule so content goes out within the planned windows
	Maintain a rolling content calendar visible to the founder, showing what is scheduled and what is needed


Caption Writing and Voice:


	Write captions in the founder's authentic first-person voice: personal, energetic, confident, and specific rather than generic or advisory
	Match caption tone to content pillar (educational and authoritative for Expert Authority content, warm and personal for Founder Story content, etc.)
	Maintain consistent brand voice across all platforms while adapting format to each platform's norms


Community Management and Engagement:


	Monitor and respond to comments and DMs in a timely manner, in the founder's voice or an approved brand voice
	Identify and escalate any sensitive, negative, or time-critical messages to the founder directly
	Proactively engage with community members, customers, and relevant accounts to build relationships and visibility
	Identify user-generated content and customer tags worth resharing


Performance Reporting and Optimization:


	Track engagement, follower growth, reach, and content performance across all managed channels
	Report monthly on what content is performing best and why, with clear recommendations
	Identify trends, formats, or topics worth testing based on performance data and platform trends
	Flag underperforming content patterns early rather than continuing them by default


What This Role is Not:


	To avoid mismatched expectations, this role explicitly does not include the following. These are owned by other people or roles already in place:
	Filming, shooting, or editing video and photo content (owned by the contracted videographer)
	Paid social or Google ad buying, campaign management, or ad budget strategy (covered under a separate Digital Media Buyer role)
	Email marketing execution in Klaviyo (coordination is expected, ownership is not)
	Bookkeeping, accounting, or financial reporting
	Website or Shopify management


Requirements


	3 to 5 years of managing organic social strategy for a brand or founder personal page, with measurable growth results to show
	Strong working knowledge of Instagram (primary), TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube
	Demonstrated experience building and maintaining multi-week or monthly content calendars
	Strong caption and short-form copywriting skills; ability to write convincingly in a founder's first-person voice
	Experience managing comments, DMs, and community engagement professionally and on-brand Beauty, hair care, or CPG experience
	Strongly preferred; understanding of the natural hair or beauty community is a significant plus 
	Experience with social scheduling platforms (Later or similar) preferred
	Ability to translate platform analytics into plain-language insight and recommendations, not just exported numbers.



     

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Hotel General Manager",
  "description": "Elevare Human Solutions Limited - Our client in the hospitality industry is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel General Manager

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	Our client is seeking an experienced and highly competent Hotel General Manager to lead and oversee all aspects of hotel operations.
	The ideal candidate must possess a proven track record of successfully managing hotel operations, driving revenue growth, improving guest satisfaction, and leading high-performing teams within the hospitality sector.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide strategic leadership and oversee the day-to-day operations of the hotel.
	Develop and implement business strategies to increase occupancy, revenue, and profitability.
	Drive business development initiatives and establish partnerships that enhance the hotel&rsquo;s market presence.
	Ensure exceptional guest experiences and maintain the highest standards of customer service.
	Monitor and manage hotel budgets, financial performance, and operational costs.
	Lead, mentor, and supervise departmental managers and staff.
	Develop and enforce operational policies and procedures to ensure efficiency and compliance.
	Analyze market trends and implement strategies to remain competitive within the hospitality industry.
	Handle guest concerns and resolve operational issues promptly and professionally.


Requirements


	Minimum of 5 years of proven experience as a Hotel General Manager.
	Extensive experience managing hotel operations within the hospitality industry.
	Previous experience working in hotels located in Lagos is highly preferred.
	Strong business development and revenue-generation skills.
	Demonstrated ability to improve hotel profitability and operational performance.
	Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Strong financial management, budgeting, and reporting capabilities.
	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or a related field.


Preferred Candidate Profile:


	Candidates with experience managing hotels within Lagos Island or other parts of Lagos will have a strong advantage.
	Results-oriented professional with a history of achieving revenue and growth targets.


Salary
N500,000 - N700,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careershub@elevare.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Hotel General Manager Job at Elevare Human Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Elevare Human Solutions Limited - Our client in the hospitality industry is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel General Manager

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	Our client is seeking an experienced and highly competent Hotel General Manager to lead and oversee all aspects of hotel operations.
	The ideal candidate must possess a proven track record of successfully managing hotel operations, driving revenue growth, improving guest satisfaction, and leading high-performing teams within the hospitality sector.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Provide strategic leadership and oversee the day-to-day operations of the hotel.
	Develop and implement business strategies to increase occupancy, revenue, and profitability.
	Drive business development initiatives and establish partnerships that enhance the hotel’s market presence.
	Ensure exceptional guest experiences and maintain the highest standards of customer service.
	Monitor and manage hotel budgets, financial performance, and operational costs.
	Lead, mentor, and supervise departmental managers and staff.
	Develop and enforce operational policies and procedures to ensure efficiency and compliance.
	Analyze market trends and implement strategies to remain competitive within the hospitality industry.
	Handle guest concerns and resolve operational issues promptly and professionally.


Requirements


	Minimum of 5 years of proven experience as a Hotel General Manager.
	Extensive experience managing hotel operations within the hospitality industry.
	Previous experience working in hotels located in Lagos is highly preferred.
	Strong business development and revenue-generation skills.
	Demonstrated ability to improve hotel profitability and operational performance.
	Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Strong financial management, budgeting, and reporting capabilities.
	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or a related field.


Preferred Candidate Profile:


	Candidates with experience managing hotels within Lagos Island or other parts of Lagos will have a strong advantage.
	Results-oriented professional with a history of achieving revenue and growth targets.


Salary
N500,000 - N700,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory & Fulfillment Officer",
  "description": "The Company,&nbsp;Pallyshop Discount operates a technology-driven e-commerce marketplace connecting buyers and sellers with various discount-driven offers.The Inventoryand Fulfillment Officer is responsible for executing daily fulfillment and delivery operations, ensuring that customer and subscriber orders are processed, dispatched, tracked, and delivered accurately and on time.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory &amp; Fulfillment Officer

Job Location: Ojodu Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Duties and Responsibilities
Order Processing and Fulfillment:


	Receive and review customer orders from the platform.
	Pick, sort, and prepare products for delivery.
	Ensure orders are packed accurately and according to company standards.
	Verify product quantities, quality, and specifications before dispatch.
	Update order status in the company&#39;s system.


Delivery Coordination:


	Coordinate daily deliveries with drivers.

Inventory & Fulfillment Officer Job at  Pallyshop Discount




        
    

        
        The Company, Pallyshop Discount operates a technology-driven e-commerce marketplace connecting buyers and sellers with various discount-driven offers.The Inventoryand Fulfillment Officer is responsible for executing daily fulfillment and delivery operations, ensuring that customer and subscriber orders are processed, dispatched, tracked, and delivered accurately and on time.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory & Fulfillment Officer

Job Location: Ojodu Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Duties and Responsibilities
Order Processing and Fulfillment:
     

            
    




	Receive and review customer orders from the platform.
	Pick, sort, and prepare products for delivery.
	Ensure orders are packed accurately and according to company standards.
	Verify product quantities, quality, and specifications before dispatch.
	Update order status in the company's system.


Delivery Coordination:


	Coordinate daily deliveries with drivers.
	Ensure all dispatched orders reach customers within the agreed timeframe.
	Follow up on pending, delayed, or failed deliveries.


Inventory Management:


	Monitor stock levels.
	Conduct routine stock counts and inventory reconciliation.
	Record stock movements accurately.
	Report low stock levels, damaged products, or inventory discrepancies to the line Manager.
	Ensure products are properly stored and handled.
	Documentation and Record Keeping


Maintain accurate records of:


	Orders fulfilled
	Deliveries completed
	Returns and exchanges
	Inventory movements
	Delivery expenses


 Quality Control:


	Inspect products before dispatch to ensure quality standards are met.
	Report damaged, expired, or defective products immediately.


Daily Responsibilities


	Confirm orders received for fulfillment.
	Coordinate product picking and packing.
	Prepare dispatch schedules.
	Monitor delivery execution.
	Update delivery and inventory records.
	Follow up on outstanding deliveries.


Reporting Line:


	Reports To: Business Development and Operations Manager


Required Competencies:


	Basic logistics and inventory management knowledge.
	Good communication and customer service skills.
	Attention to detail.
	Record-keeping and reporting skills.
	Problem-solving ability.
	Familiarity with e-commerce operations and order management systems.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Inventory & Fulfilment Officer” as the subject of the email.
